lsp.justification: Mostly matches the GT: it identifies the key protected queues/counters, separate `bio_mutex_comp`, unmutexed pipe, redisAtomic AOF fields, and immutable `server.bio_cpulist`. However it adds `bio_job` as shared state not in the GT scope and gives a flawed pipe rationale by saying each end has only one thread despite 3 bio workers writing; it also omits `bio_mutex[]`/`bio_mutex_comp` themselves as shared state entries from the GT inventory.
